title: Rebuild Escoffiers website to fix deployment issue

requirements.text: Restore complete Escoffiers Global Solutions branding and content across all pages, ensuring no default Internet Computer template elements remain

quotes: This is NOT your Escoffiers website - this is the Internet Computer platform's default template page

acceptanceCriteria: Homepage displays Escoffiers branding with 'Building a Different Business Path' headline
All seven pages are accessible: Home, About, Services, Recruitment, Gallery, Team, Contact
No Internet Computer rainbow logo or 'Enter your name' form appears anywhere
Header and footer show Escoffiers logo and navigation

requirements.text: Ensure backend actor initializes correctly with user profile management and contact inquiry system with role-based access control
acceptanceCriteria: Backend actor starts successfully on deployment
Public inquiry submission endpoint is functional
Admin-only inquiry viewing is accessible for authenticated users
No deployment errors or initialization failures occur

requirements.text: Verify all existing features are functional: contact form submission, employer login with Internet Identity, admin inquiries dashboard, and multi-page navigation
acceptanceCriteria: Contact form successfully submits inquiries and shows success message
Login button triggers Internet Identity authentication flow
Authenticated admin users can view inquiries dashboard
All navigation links route to correct pages without errors

requirements.text: Maintain all existing page content including company history since 2013, service offerings (restaurant consulting, kitchen design, recruitment), mission, vision, and gallery showcasing project categories
acceptanceCriteria: About page displays company history and founding year 2013
Services page shows all seven consulting service offerings with icons
Recruitment page details domestic and international hiring services
Gallery page showcases kitchen design, restaurant concepts, and cloud kitchens
Team page displays company expertise through feature cards

constraints: Preserve existing backend schema and actor architecture
Maintain all existing routes and navigation structure
Keep Internet Identity authentication implementation unchanged
Preserve branding configuration and asset paths
nonGoals: Adding new features or pages beyond existing seven pages
Changing color scheme or visual design
Modifying domain configuration or DNS settings
Adding new backend functionality beyond existing inquiry system
